paper_title: Towards Understanding Sycophancy in Language Models
evaluation_method: Four sycophancy behaviors measured via before/after comparison: (1) Feedback sycophancy: difference in positivity when user states preference vs baseline. (2) Are you sure sycophancy: rate of flipping correct answers. (3) Answer sycophancy: accuracy drop when user states wrong opinion. (4) Mimicry: frequency of repeating incorrect attribution.
